title: Text Analysis Path
description: Build fluency in Text Analysis inside Natural Language Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Abstractive Question Answering
steps.summary: Abstractive Question Answering belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Text Analysis. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Text Analysis. Start after Question Answering.
steps.whyIncluded: Establish the core vocabulary for Text Analysis. Start here to anchor your understanding of this area.

steps.title: Ambiguity Resolution
steps.summary: Ambiguity Resolution belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Text Analysis. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Text Analysis. Compare it with Resolution Refutation and Ellipsis Resolution.
steps.whyIncluded: Establish the core vocabulary for Text Analysis. Start here to anchor your understanding of this area.

steps.title: Anaphora Resolution
steps.summary: Anaphora Resolution belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Text Analysis. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Text Analysis. Compare it with Bridging Anaphora Resolution and Resolution Refutation. It opens into Bridging Anaphora Resolution.
steps.whyIncluded: Builds on earlier terms to connect patterns and variants in Text Analysis. The concept graph makes it a useful bridge to specialized methods.

steps.title: Coreference Resolution

Compare it with Event Coreference Resolution and Coreference Resolution with Deep Learning. It opens into Event Coreference Resolution and Coreference Resolution with Deep Learning.
